When limo pulled up. Driver asked if he would mind sharing it with 2 other guys. He says sure. Then proceeds to get in limo and ripped this huge fart.  He had a fart noise maker with him in his pocket that he brought with him to play golf at a country club. We all start cracking up. What a frigging legend.
